mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_cache_repair_task ( task_id, user_id, status, attempt, next_attempt_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{userId}, 'PENDING', 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_cache_repair_task SET user_id = #{userId}, status = 'PENDING', attempt = 0, next_attempt_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error = NULL, resolved_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE agent_cache_repair_task SET status = 'RESOLVED', resolved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE agent_cache_repair_task SET status = 'PENDING', attempt = attempt + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, next_attempt_at = #{nextAttemptAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
